title: Total RNA Isolation from Bulk Tissue or Isolated Cells
steps: Transfer biopsy in 1.8 mL cryotube (polypropylene) in 1.0 mL RNAlater
Use color coding cap inserts to indicate biopsy origin
Store dissected tissue portion in less than 50 µL RNAlater solution and store at -20 °C until total RNA extraction

For total RNA/DNA extraction use “AllPrep DNA/RNA Micro Kit” (# 80284) from Qiagen following respective protocol. Use optional Beta-ME for glomerular compartment. Note : Elute RNA in 16 µL H 2 O in nucleotide low-binding tubes (Eppendorf #022431021) and store at -80 °C . Note : Keep first flow-through (< 80 bases) for future analysis of small RNAs . Quality and quantity were measured using Agilent Bioanalyzer 2100 Elute RNA in 16uL
Use NEBNext® Ultra™ II Directional RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina® (rRNA depletion workflow)1.Use NEBNext® Ultra™ II Directional RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina® (rRNA depletion workflow)
Use NovaSeq 6000 to sequence. (The University of Michigan Advanced Genomics Core)1.Use NovaSeq 6000 to sequence. (The University of Michigan Advanced Genomics Core)
creator: Brad Godfrey
